2603.21508.title: Optimizing Feature Extraction for On-device Model Inference with User Behavior Sequences
2603.21508.paper_summary: Machine learning models are widely integrated into modern mobile apps to analyze user behaviors and deliver personalized services. Ensuring low-latency on-device model execution is critical for maintaining high-quality user experiences. While prior research has primarily focused on accelerating model inference with given input features, we identify an overlooked bottleneck in real-world on-device model execution pipelines: extracting input features from raw application logs. In this work, we explore a new direction of feature extraction optimization by analyzing and eliminating redundant extraction operations across different model features and consecutive model inferences. We then introduce AutoFeature, an automated feature extraction engine designed to accelerate on-device feature extraction process without compromising model inference accuracy. AutoFeature comprises three core designs: (1) graph abstraction to formulate the extraction workflows of different input features as one directed acyclic graph, (2) graph optimization to identify and fuse redundant operation nodes across different features within the graph; (3) efficient caching to minimize operations on overlapping raw data between consecutive model inferences. We implement a system prototype of AutoFeature and integrate it into five industrial mobile services spanning search, video and e-commerce domains. Online evaluations show that AutoFeature reduces end-to-end on-device model execution latency by 1.33x-3.93x during daytime and 1.43x-4.53x at night.
2603.21508.paper_summary_zh: 機器學習模型廣泛整合於現代行動應用程式中，以分析用戶行為並提供個性化服務。確保低延遲的裝置內模型執行對於維持高品質的用戶體驗至關重要。雖然先前的研究主要集中於加速給定輸入特徵的模型推論，但我們識別出在現實世界的裝置內模型執行管道中被忽視的瓶頸：從原始應用程式日誌中提取輸入特徵。在本研究中，我們探索了一種新的特徵提取優化方向，通過分析和消除不同模型特徵和連續模型推論之間的冗餘提取操作。我們然後介紹了AutoFeature，一個自動化特徵提取引擎，旨在加速裝置內特徵提取過程，而不妥協模型推論的準確性。AutoFeature包含三個核心設計：（1）圖形抽象，將不同輸入特徵的提取工作流程表述為一個有向無環圖；（2）圖形優化，以識別並融合圖中不同特徵之間的冗餘操作節點；（3）高效緩存，以最小化連續模型推論之間對重疊原始數據的操作。我們實現了AutoFeature的系統原型，並將其整合到五個涵蓋搜尋、視頻和電子商務領域的工業行動服務中。線上評估顯示，AutoFeature在白天將端到端的裝置內模型執行延遲減少了1.33倍至3.93倍，在夜間減少了1.43倍至4.53倍。
2603.21508.author: Chen Gong et.al.
2603.21508.authors: Chen Gong, Zhenzhe Zheng, Yiliu Chen, Sheng Wang, Fan Wu, Guihai Chen
